title: Waterfall Giant

moves.title: About to Blow
effects: Convert all Steam Eruption stacks into eruption damage

moves.title: Explode
effects: Deal damage equal to accumulated Steam Eruption stacks

move_pattern: Starts with Pressurize. Then cycles: Stomp → Ram → Siphon → Pressure Gun → Pressure Up → back to Stomp. When externally triggered (at a threshold), interrupts into About to Blow (once), then Explode repeating.
notes: Each move applies Steam Eruption to the Waterfall Giant itself: Pressurize grants 20 stacks, and every subsequent move grants 3 stacks. Pressure Gun starts at 23 damage and increases by 5 each time it is used. When a trigger threshold is reached, TriggerAboutToBlowState() is called externally: the monster's HP is set to infinite (invincible), and on its next turn it performs About to Blow — saving its total Steam Eruption stack count as eruption damage and removing the power. It then repeatedly uses Explode, dealing that saved damage to the player before dying. Siphon heals 15 HP per player, so it scales in multiplayer. The monster only fades on death if it has not yet built up any pressure (PressureBuildupIdx == 0). ShouldDisappearFromDoom is true only when the monster lacks Steam Eruption.
